plan.name: mebt-cav1-phase-acceptance-map
plan.description: Scan MEBT:CAV1 phase around the known stable point of -90 degrees to map acceptance boundaries while avoiding MPS trips.
plan.rationale: Previous scans indicate that phases at -89 and -90 are stable, but scanning from -90 towards more negative values or large positive deviations causes trips. We will perform a narrow sweep centered on the known safe point of -90 degrees with small steps to map the local acceptance without exceeding the quench limit (0.16 MV) or triggering loss monitors.
